economic_notes: Kitsaki Development LP and Kitsaki Management LP are business partnerships accounted for by modified equity method. Nation holds 99.9% in each. Kitsaki Group total revenue $42,323,656, net income $9,419,033. Proportionately consolidated government partnerships include Lac La Ronge Regional Waste Management Corporation (40%), Lac La Ronge Regional Water Corporation (54%), and Woodland Cree Enterprises Incorporated (33.33%). COVID-19 impacted operations but ISC increased funding to offset impacts.
notes: Fiscal year is March 31, 2021 — not 2024. Audit report dated August 16, 2023, suggesting significant delay in financial reporting. Tangible capital assets net book value not explicitly stated in the text provided (Schedule 1 referenced but not included). Restricted cash includes both current ($23,835,781) and non-current ($3,751,097) totalling $27,586,878. Kitsaki Group (two limited partnerships at 99.9%) accounted for by modified equity method — not consolidated, representing significant off-balance-sheet assets (~$95.8M investment balance). Long-term debt covenant non-compliance noted but management does not expect it to affect financing. Home Ownership Program contingent liabilities of $7,500,000 to BMO and RBC. ISC funding total includes both ISC ($116,101,967) and ISC FNIHB ($27,704,154); total_government_transfers includes ISC, FNIHB, CMHC, Northern Lights School Division, Prince Albert Grand Council, and Province of Saskatchewan. Nation enacted its own Land Code governing capital and revenue land revenues.
